title: pentanema × doellianum
intro: Pentanema × doellianum, also known as Doell's fleabane or Doell's pentanema, is a hybrid plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Pentanema × doellianum can be found in infusions, teas, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and effects.
